evidence.claim: Used Kubeflow, Embeddings, FAISS, Feature Engineering, OpenCV, Milvus, BigQuery, CNN, Python, LangChain, Semantic Search, QLoRA, Java, LLMs, Hugging Face Transformers, Weights & Biases
evidence.source_text: Skills: Machine Learning (expert, 84mo, 25 endorsements); Kubeflow (advanced, 33mo, 49 endorsements); Embeddings (expert, 59mo, 30 endorsements); FAISS (expert, 49mo, 26 endorsements); Feature Engineering (intermediate, 13mo, 11 endorsements); OpenCV (intermediate, 30mo, 12 endorsements); Milvus (expert, 93mo, 55 endorsements); BigQuery (beginner, 2mo, 5 endorsements); CNN (advanced, 43mo, 46 endorsements); Python (expert, 78mo, 59 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 48mo, 36 endorsements); Semantic Search (expert, 68mo, 44 endorsements); QLoRA (expert, 75mo, 8 endorsements); Java (beginner, 3mo, 4 endorsements); LLMs (expert, 61mo, 38 endorsements); Hugging Face Transformers (advanced, 21mo, 37 endorsements); Forecasting (advanced, 44mo, 14 endorsements); Weights & Biases (intermediate, 12mo, 0 endorsements)
Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% at Zoho
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for internal knowledge base of ~500K documents
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping real systems over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Focuses on infrastructure and data quality over modeling
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.
